subject: computer_science
Using the Spacy Library in Python, what.question_text: Using the Spacy Library in Python, what does the value.lemma_ method do?
Using the Spacy Library in Python, what.answer_text:
Returns the base form of the word 
token = "Apple", "looking"
token.lemma_
>>> apple , look
Using the Spacy Library in Python, what.file_name: Using the Spacy Library in Python, what does the value.lemma_ method do?.md

subject: computer_science
Using the Spacy Library in Python, what.question_text: Using the Spacy Library in Python, what does the value.is_stop method do?
Using the Spacy Library in Python, what.answer_text:
Returns a boolean, Is the token part of a stop list, i.e. the most common words of the language?
tokens = ["Apple", "is", "$", "for", "at"]
token.is_stop
>>> [False, True, False, True, True]
Using the Spacy Library in Python, what.file_name: Using the Spacy Library in Python, what does the value.is_stop method do?.md

subject: computer_science
Using the Spacy Library in Python, if yo.question_text: Using the Spacy Library in Python, if you want get information on a tag or label, what code do you use to achieve this?
Using the Spacy Library in Python, if yo.answer_text:
spacy.explain("label")
Example:
spacy.explain("VBZ") returns "verb, 3rd person singular present"

subject: computer_science
Using the Spacy Library in Python, what.question_text: Using the Spacy Library in Python, what does the value.dep_ method do?
Using the Spacy Library in Python, what.answer_text:
Returns the Syntactic dependency, i.e. the relation between tokens
token = "Apple", "looking", "startup"
token.dep_
>>> nsubj ROOT dobj
Using the Spacy Library in Python, what.file_name: Using the Spacy Library in Python, what does the value.dep_ method do?.md
Using the Spacy Library in Python, what.file_path: /home/araycove/Documents/Education/Question Notes/Computer_Science/Python - Spacy Library/Using the Spacy Library in Python, what does the value.dep_ method do?.md
Using the Spacy Library in Python, what.id: Using the Spacy Library in Python, what does the value.dep_ method do?.md

subject: computer_science
Using the Spacy Library in Python, what.question_text: Using the Spacy Library in Python, what does the value.pos_ method do?
Using the Spacy Library in Python, what.answer_text:
Returns the simple UPOS part-of-speech tag 
token = "Apple", "is", "looking" 
token.pos_
>>> PROPN AUX VERB

Reference:
https://universaldependencies.org/u/pos/
Using the Spacy Library in Python, what.file_name: Using the Spacy Library in Python, what does the value.pos_ method do?.md
Using the Spacy Library in Python, what.file_path: /home/araycove/Documents/Education/Question Notes/Computer_Science/Python - Spacy Library/Using the Spacy Library in Python, what does the value.pos_ method do?.md

subject: computer_science
Using the Spacy Library in Python, what.question_text: Using the Spacy Library in Python, what does the value.tag_ method do?
Using the Spacy Library in Python, what.answer_text:
Returns the detailed part-of-speech tag
token = "Apple", "looking"
token.tag_
>>> NNP VBG
Using the Spacy Library in Python, what.file_name: Using the Spacy Library in Python, what does the value.tag_ method do?.md

subject: computer_science
Using the Spacy Library in Python, what.question_text: Using the Spacy Library in Python, what does the value.text method do?
Using the Spacy Library in Python, what.answer_text:
Returns the original word text
token = "Apple"
token.text
>>> Apple

subject: computer_science
Using the Spacy Library in Python, what.question_text: Using the Spacy Library in Python, what does the value.is_alpha method do?
Using the Spacy Library in Python, what.answer_text:
Returns a boolean, Is the token an alpha character?
tokens = ["Apple", "is", "U.K", "$", "1"]
token.alpha_
>>> [True, True, False, False, False]
Using the Spacy Library in Python, what.file_name: Using the Spacy Library in Python, what does the value.is_alpha method do?.md

subject: computer_science
Using the Spacy Library in Python, what.question_text: Using the Spacy Library in Python, what does the value.shape_ method do?
Using the Spacy Library in Python, what.answer_text:
Returns the word shape - capitalization, punctuation, digits
token = $ , U.K. , Apple
token.shape_
>>> $ X.X Xxxxx
Using the Spacy Library in Python, what.file_name: Using the Spacy Library in Python, what does the value.shape_ method do?.md
